rusty_dagger.name: a rusty dagger
rusty_dagger.description: A pitted iron dagger, more rust than blade, but it still holds an edge.

short_sword.name: a short sword
short_sword.description: A well-balanced soldier's blade with a leather-wrapped grip.

oak_staff.name: an oak staff
oak_staff.description: A gnarled staff of oak, faintly warm to the touch.

wooden_shield.name: a wooden shield
wooden_shield.description: A round shield banded in iron, scarred from old fights.

leather_armor.name: a suit of leather armor
leather_armor.description: Worn but sturdy leather armor, smelling faintly of tallow.

chainmail.name: a shirt of chainmail
chainmail.description: Interlocking steel rings, heavy but reliable.

healing_potion.name: a healing potion
healing_potion.description: A small vial of red liquid that smells faintly of crushed herbs.

iron_key.name: a tarnished iron key
iron_key.description: An old iron key, green with verdigris. It looks important.

goblin_ear.name: a severed goblin ear
goblin_ear.description: A grisly trophy, still faintly twitching.

tarnished_crown.name: a tarnished silver crown
tarnished_crown.description: A small silver crown, dented and tarnished, taken from a locked chest.

dock_rat.name: a mangy dock rat
dock_rat.description: A large rat with matted fur, baring yellow teeth.

sewer_goblin.name: a sewer goblin
sewer_goblin.description: A scrawny goblin clutching a rusty blade, eyes darting nervously.

goblin_brute.name: a hulking goblin brute
goblin_brute.description: A scarred goblin twice the size of its kin, wielding a crude club.

grey_wolf.name: a grey wolf
grey_wolf.description: A lean wolf with hungry eyes, hackles raised.

bandit.name: a road bandit
bandit.description: A rough-looking bandit in mismatched leather armor.

bandit_leader.name: the bandit leader
bandit_leader.description: A grizzled bandit captain with a wicked-looking falchion.

tavern.name: The Rusty Anchor
tavern.description: Warm lantern-light spills over scarred oak tables. A fire crackles in a stone hearth, and the smell of stew and spilled ale hangs in the air. A barkeep polishes mugs behind a long counter, half-listening to a sailor's tall tale. This is where most adventurers in town start their day.

market_square.name: Market Square
market_square.description: Awnings of faded cloth shade a busy square. Vendors hawk fruit, fish, and trinkets from rickety carts, and a fountain trickles weakly at the center, green with algae.

blacksmith.name: Brackwater's Forge
blacksmith.description: Heat rolls off a roaring forge in waves. Racks of blades, shields, and armor line the walls, and a heavyset smith hammers steadily at an anvil, not looking up.

general_store.name: The Dusty Satchel
general_store.description: Shelves sag under the weight of rope, lanterns, dried rations, and unlabeled jars. A bored shopkeeper sits behind a counter, idly counting coins.

high_ward_gate.name: The High Gate
high_ward_gate.description: A tall wrought-iron gate separates the merchant quarter from the quiet, manicured streets beyond. Two guards in polished mail eye passersby with practiced suspicion.

high_ward.name: High Ward Courtyard
high_ward.description: Manicured hedges line a cobbled courtyard. Behind tall windows, the silhouettes of the wealthy move about their business, indifferent to the world below.

harbor_docks.name: The Harbor Docks
harbor_docks.description: Weathered piers stretch out over dark water, creaking under the weight of crates and coiled rope. Gulls wheel overhead, screeching at the fishmongers below.

harbormaster_office.name: Harbormaster's Office
harbormaster_office.description: Charts of the coastline cover every wall. A tired clerk shuffles manifests at a cluttered desk, muttering about overdue cargo.

fish_market.name: The Fish Market
fish_market.description: Stalls of packed ice display the morning catch. The smell is overwhelming, but the haggling is fierce and good-natured.

sewer_entrance.name: Sewer Grate
sewer_entrance.description: A rusted grate hangs open above a slick stone shaft leading down into darkness. The stench rising from below is unmistakable.

sewer_tunnel_1.name: Sewer Tunnel
sewer_tunnel_1.description: Foul water trickles along a cracked stone channel. Something skitters in the dark just beyond the edge of sight.

sewer_tunnel_2.name: Deeper Sewer Tunnel
sewer_tunnel_2.description: The tunnel narrows here, walls slick with algae. Crude markings, more graffiti than language, are scratched into the stone.

sewer_lair.name: Goblin Lair
sewer_lair.description: Trash, bones, and stolen goods are piled in heaps around a crude camp. A heavy, dented chest sits against the far wall, secured with an old iron lock.

temple_row.name: Temple Row
temple_row.description: Quiet cobbled streets lined with modest shrines. Soft chanting drifts from an open doorway to the east.

temple_of_dawn.name: Temple of the Dawn
temple_of_dawn.description: Sunlight filters through stained glass, washing the stone floor in color. A serene priestess tends a low altar, offering quiet blessings to anyone who asks.

guildhall.name: Adventurers' Guildhall
guildhall.description: Faded banners and notched weapons hang from the rafters, trophies of guild members long retired. A weathered guildmaster nods approvingly at anyone bearing fresh scars.

city_gate.name: The Coast Gate
city_gate.description: A squat stone gatehouse marks the edge of town. Beyond it, a rutted dirt road winds north along the cliffs.

coast_road.name: The Coast Road
coast_road.description: Wind-bent grass lines a narrow road above the sea cliffs. Paw prints cross the mud heading toward a dark treeline, and wheel ruts veer off toward a stand of rocks.

wolf_den.name: The Wolf Den
wolf_den.description: A shallow cave mouth opens in the hillside, littered with bones and tufts of grey fur. Low growls echo from the darkness within.

bandit_camp.name: Bandit Camp
bandit_camp.description: A ring of stones surrounds a smoldering campfire. Stolen crates and bedrolls are scattered carelessly about, guarded by hard-eyed company.
